name: Mark Tilbury
oneLine: British entrepreneur posting personal-finance and business shorts to a 7M+ YouTube audience.
bio: Mark Tilbury is a British entrepreneur and investor who left school at 16 with no qualifications, started by making wooden trash cans for under $2 an hour, and went on to build a multi-million-dollar business. His YouTube channel has over 7 million subscribers and his content covers personal finance, side hustles, investing fundamentals and small-business advice, mostly delivered as punchy vertical shorts on TikTok and YouTube Shorts with longer explainer videos on the main channel. His content is finance/self-improvement, not comedy, and some critics have described his style as 'finfluencer' content rather than rigorous financial advice.
style: Short vertical finance explainers plus long-form interviews and tutorials (NOT comedy)
notable: Yahoo Finance feature on income streams
